name: Webbosaurus
description:
Webbosarus is a reputation management tool that helps monitor, analyze, manage, and respond to reviews on more than 10,000 online shops & rating portals from 48 countries such as Amazon, Google Maps, Trustpilot, and Trusted Shops.

‍

Source: G2

Features:

➡️Monitor and respond to reviews from a single dashboard 

➡️Review analytics 

➡️Social listening tool 

➡️Social monitoring tool

Pros: 

✅Helps monitor, manage, analyze, and respond to reviews in a single dashboard 

✅Supports multiple languages
what_people_say:
“Good overview of all reviews of our Google locations. Easy setup and competition observation. Good filters to quickly find relevant reviews.”

*Review sourced and cited by GetApp*
